global.active_cap_note: Raised to $50 staged baseline; latest read-only scans show ~$64.66 NAV after JL-USDC deposit, ~50% SOL concentration, $1.42 USDC dry powder, $9.52 in JL-USDC yield, no positive executable net edge. Cap expanded from $30 to give the supervisor room to act on small-position opportunities without owner intervention.
global.speculation_rule: Small speculative Jupiter-routable coins are allowed only after exact mint/token-program and Token-2022 extension checks, verified liquidity/exit, holder/security review, time stop, no averaging down, and preservation of the SOL fee reserve.

profit_allocation.note: Advisory targets, not hard splits. After a profit-take, the supervisor reports what the suggested allocation would be and may act on it when edge, liquidity, and thesis quality support it. No forced buy.

perps.note: Perpetuals engine is DORMANT. Set enabled=true to activate. Requires Jupiter Perps SDK integration for live execution. Current markets: SOL-PERP, BTC-PERP, ETH-PERP via Jupiter Perps v1.

predictions.note: Jupiter Terminal prediction markets. YES/NO tokens priced 0-1 USDC. Enable when ready to scan for mispriced probabilities.

market_scanner.note: Jupiter Terminal scanner: top-traded + cooking feeds. Scans volume, liquidity, price momentum, new listings. Enable when ready.

cbBTC.profit_rule: take partial profit into USDC near target if liquidity and costs remain favorable
cbBTC.risk_rule: review immediately below invalidation or on custody/bridge/wrapped-asset issue

SOL.profit_rule: do not reduce below 0.02 SOL fee reserve; no trade absent positive net edge after costs

USDC.risk_rule: review on depeg or issuer/liquidity event

JL-USDC.profit_rule: hold while withdrawal liquidity and net APY remain acceptable
JL-USDC.risk_rule: review on exploit, oracle issue, withdrawal restriction, or USDC depeg

ANSEM.time_horizon: mandatory review before any additional action
ANSEM.profit_rule: Do not add or average down; only act after fresh quote, liquidity, and Token-2022 risk review.
ANSEM.risk_rule: Treat as isolated speculation; zero additional capital until fresh thesis.
